summary: Completed testing of shipping email notification feature for Printsout e-commerce app. All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified: Products page loads with 14 products, Admin login with 2FA works, Admin Orders page displays orders correctly, Status change to 'Skickad' triggers shipping email and shows success toast 'Orderstatus uppdaterad — leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund'.

minor.issue: API key is invalid in preview environment - expected behavior per review request

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: email_service.py: send_shipping_notification() correctly implemented with proper HTML template
server.py line 1439: Correctly checks for both 'shipped' and 'skickad' (case-insensitive) to trigger shipping email
AdminOrders.js line 74-76: Correctly shows toast 'leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund' when status is 'shipped'
OrderDetailPanel.js: Status dropdown correctly displays Swedish labels (Väntande, Behandlas, Skickad, Slutförd)

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA with TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator or pyotp

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shipping email feature fully implemented and tested. When admin changes order status to 'Skickad' (shipped): (1) Backend calls send_shipping_notification() from email_service.py, (2) Frontend shows toast 'Orderstatus uppdaterad — leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund'. The Resend API key may be expired in preview environment - this is expected. Order confirmation email is also implemented and called on payment success via send_order_confirmation_email().

verified_features.POST /api/admin/verify-2fa: ✓ Returns access_token after valid TOTP code
verified_features.PUT /api/admin/orders/{id} status=shippe: ✓ Updates status and triggers shipping email
verified_features.Products page /produkter: ✓ Loads with 14 products, category filters work
verified_features.Admin login page: ✓ Login form with 2FA flow works correctly
verified_features.Admin orders page: ✓ Orders list displays, order detail panel shows on selection

frontend_ui_tests.Admin orders page: ✓ Orders list and detail panel work

email_feature_verification.shipping_email_trigger: Verified - PUT /api/admin/orders/{id} with status='shipped' or 'skickad' calls send_shipping_notification()
email_feature_verification.shipping_email_template: Verified - build_shipping_notification_html() creates Swedish email with order details
email_feature_verification.order_confirmation_email: Verified - send_order_confirmation_email() called on payment success in stripe webhook and payment status check
email_feature_verification.frontend_toast: Verified - Shows 'Orderstatus uppdaterad — leveransbekräftelse skickad till kund' when status=shipped
email_feature_verification.api_key_status: Resend API key may be expired in preview - email function is called but may fail to send
